subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Wronged One, and the servant in attendance hath laid it before Him. We answer thee through a Tablet from whose horizon a luminary hath shone forth [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! At Thy mention am I enraptured,at the sound of Thy voiceam I made to tremble, by the sweet-scented breezes of Thy Revelation am I given life
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و عرضه العبد الحاضر اجبناک بلوح لاح من افقه نیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Word of God the cause of creation
